hooks.command: echo "If this edit touches a linter, formatter, or typecheck config (.eslintrc*, eslint.config.*, .prettierrc*, tsconfig*.json, biome.json): do not weaken rules to silence an error — fix the code instead (ecc-essentials)."
if [ -f tsconfig.json ] && command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx tsc --noEmit || echo "typecheck failing — fix before proceeding (ecc-essentials)"; fi
echo "Before calling this done: are the tests green, and is nothing secret hardcoded or staged? (ecc-essentials)"
